variants.name: 商羯罗
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，邪恶玩家可以秘密交流1分钟。[与你邻座的一名善良玩家会变成邪恶的商羯罗]
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
variants.flavor: In fire we were born...In unity we live...
